summary: RBAC Permissions and Customer Performance filter UI testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: merge_permissions(None, 'store_manager') returns admin._enabled=True but admin_dashboard=False, lead_sources=False, integrations=False
merge_permissions(None, 'org_admin') returns all admin items enabled
Legacy roles ('admin', 'manager') correctly fall back to user permissions (admin._enabled=False)
All roles have date_triggers=True, manage_showcase=True, activity_reports=True, email_analytics=True as required
Customer Performance page filter pills redesigned: equal-width solid buttons with proper padding, not overlapping horizontal scroll
Period filters (Today/This Week/This Month/All Time) are clickable and load new data
Scope filters (My Contacts/Organization/Global) are clickable and load new data
Frontend more.tsx Admin section (lines 514-541) correctly filters admin items by perm('admin', 'item_key') checks
Super admin sees all admin items: Users, Invite Team, Company Directory, Shared Inboxes, Store Profile, Brand Kit, Admin Dashboard, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC permissions fully implemented with 4 role templates. Customer Performance page filters redesigned with equal-width buttons. The permissions.py merge_permissions function now takes a 'role' parameter and uses the appropriate template. Frontend Admin section filters items based on permission keys.

rbac_permissions.store_manager_role: PASS - admin._enabled=True, limited items (no admin_dashboard, lead_sources, integrations)
rbac_permissions.legacy_roles_fallback: PASS - 'admin' and 'manager' roles fall back to user permissions

customer_performance_page.filter_pills_styling: PASS - equal-width solid buttons, not overlapping
customer_performance_page.period_filters: PASS - Today/This Week/This Month/All Time clickable and load data
customer_performance_page.scope_filters: PASS - My Contacts/Organization/Global clickable and load data
customer_performance_page.heat_labels: PASS - Very Engaged, Engaged, Warm, Cool displayed correctly
customer_performance_page.score_bars: PASS - proportional bars with scores displayed

admin_menu_rbac.super_admin_visibility: PASS - Administration section visible with all items
